settings.title: Free Pruning Morning at the Yard This March
settings.excerpt: Bring a branch and a photo of your shrub and we will show you exactly where to make the cut.
settings.body:
Spring is the moment people reach for the secateurs and then freeze, unsure where to start. So we are opening the yard for a free pruning morning on the last Saturday of March.

Bring photos of the shrubs that puzzle you, and a sample branch if you can. We will demonstrate on our own stock plants and send you home knowing the difference between a renewal cut and a heading cut.

There will be tea, and a table of bare-root hedging at cost price for anyone who wants to plant before the season closes.

No booking needed. Just turn up between nine and noon.
